---
title: "Connect"
---

Get in touch and follow our work.

## Mailing list

We host a mailing list, **district magnitude (DM)**, at [Groups.io](https://groups.io).

- **To subscribe**, send an empty message to [district-magnitude+subscribe@groups.io](mailto:district-magnitude+subscribe@groups.io).
- **To join the list as a member**, contact [district-magnitude+owner@groups.io](mailto:district-magnitude+owner@groups.io).
